testcase.name: smokeTest
testcase.failure: File: daml/Main.daml Hidden: no Range: 3:1-3:19 Source: typecheck Severity: DsWarning Message: daml/Main.daml:3:1: warning: The import of ‘Daml.Script’ is redundant except perhaps to import instances from ‘Daml.Script’ To import instances alone, use: import Daml.Script() File: daml/MultisigWallet.daml Hidden: no Range: 1:1-2:1 Source: compiler Severity: DsError Message: ScriptBackendException {scriptNote = "Failed to create script context", scriptBackendError = BErrorClient (ClientIOError (GRPCIOBadStatusCode StatusInternal (StatusDetails {unStatusDetails = "java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: non expected non first character 0x130 in Daml-LF Name \"SCR\196\176PT\""}) fromList []))} File: daml/MultisigWalletTest.daml Hidden: no Range: 1:1-2:1 Source: compiler Severity: DsError Message: ScriptBackendException {scriptNote = "Failed to create script context", scriptBackendError = BErrorClient (ClientIOError (GRPCIOBadStatusCode StatusInternal (StatusDetails {unStatusDetails = "java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: non expected non first character 0x130 in Daml-LF Name \"SCR\196\176PT\""}) fromList []))} File: daml/MultisigWalletTest.daml Hidden: no Range: 18:16-18:27 Source: typecheck Severity: DsWarning Message: daml/MultisigWalletTest.daml:18:16: warning: In the use of ‘submitMulti’ (imported from Daml.Script, but defined in Daml.Script.Internal.Questions.Submit): Deprecated: "Legacy API, use `submit`, `actAs` and `readAs` separately" File: daml/MultisigWalletTest.daml Hidden: no Range: 227:16-227:27 Source: typecheck Severity: DsWarning Message: daml/MultisigWalletTest.daml:227:16: warning: In the use of ‘submitMulti’ (imported from Daml.Script, but defined in Daml.Script.Internal.Questions.Submit): Deprecated: "Legacy API, use `submit`, `actAs` and `readAs` separately"

testcase.name: setup2of3
testcase.failure: File: daml/Main.daml Hidden: no Range: 3:1-3:19 Source: typecheck Severity: DsWarning Message: daml/Main.daml:3:1: warning: The import of ‘Daml.Script’ is redundant except perhaps to import instances from ‘Daml.Script’ To import instances alone, use: import Daml.Script() File: daml/MultisigWallet.daml Hidden: no Range: 1:1-2:1 Source: compiler Severity: DsError Message: ScriptBackendException {scriptNote = "Failed to create script context", scriptBackendError = BErrorClient (ClientIOError (GRPCIOBadStatusCode StatusInternal (StatusDetails {unStatusDetails = "java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: non expected non first character 0x130 in Daml-LF Name \"SCR\196\176PT\""}) fromList []))} File: daml/MultisigWalletTest.daml Hidden: no Range: 1:1-2:1 Source: compiler Severity: DsError Message: ScriptBackendException {scriptNote = "Failed to create script context", scriptBackendError = BErrorClient (ClientIOError (GRPCIOBadStatusCode StatusInternal (StatusDetails {unStatusDetails = "java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: non expected non first character 0x130 in Daml-LF Name \"SCR\196\176PT\""}) fromList []))} File: daml/MultisigWalletTest.daml Hidden: no Range: 18:16-18:27 Source: typecheck Severity: DsWarning Message: daml/MultisigWalletTest.daml:18:16: warning: In the use of ‘submitMulti’ (imported from Daml.Script, but defined in Daml.Script.Internal.Questions.Submit): Deprecated: "Legacy API, use `submit`, `actAs` and `readAs` separately" File: daml/MultisigWalletTest.daml Hidden: no Range: 227:16-227:27 Source: typecheck Severity: DsWarning Message: daml/MultisigWalletTest.daml:227:16: warning: In the use of ‘submitMulti’ (imported from Daml.Script, but defined in Daml.Script.Internal.Questions.Submit): Deprecated: "Legacy API, use `submit`, `actAs` and `readAs` separately"
